⤷ Karina had been your best friend since in a kindergarten. Karina and you always do everything together and literally never apart from each other.

But after a few years, you realized you had a crush on her but you decided to brush it off maybe it's just a little crush and it will eventually fade away. And you know that you don't stand a chance with her because Karina doesn't likes girls ( well at least that's what you thought.. ) and she already have a boyfriend.

You ere heartbroken inside when you found about that but happy for her, Karina don't know that you like girls. Well—nobody does.
